final:
module t_flip_flop (
    input wire T,
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    output reg obf_Q
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            obf_Q <= 0;
        end else if (T) begin
            obf_Q <= ~obf_Q; // toggle obf_Q
        end
    end
endmodule
